executive_summary: Two major onboardings dominated the week: **MedStation** (multi-location med spa) kicked off with a 3-month GHL pilot to fix WhatsApp automation, review engine, and NextGen EHR mirroring, and **Maadi Law** started full CRM migration from Clio Grow to GHL with tracking compliance blockers flagged. Full Smile's CRM handoff to Ahmed/Ali surfaced five critical bugs (OpenDental sync miss, Digital Ocean timezone issues, duplicate contacts); Billy Doe Meats' subscription-box video ads remain stalled 33 days; Quality HVAC's Fibid booking bot needs benchmarking against a marketplace template by July 31. Tom from Steel Round Bars received Sugar CRM onboarding with Epicor live integration, and Liferun's Becklar deactivation automation—specced in March—is still unbuilt and blocking device returns. Both new law and med spa clients require DNS/SPF/A2P compliance setup before ad spend turns on.

departments_overview.summary: Heavy handoff week: Full Smile's five open bugs (sync miss, timezone, duplicates, voicemail, ad tracking) handed to Ahmed/Ali; MedStation pilot build underway pending BAA and access; Maadi Law's tracking compliance item is a launch blocker; Liferun's Becklar deactivation gap (March spec, never built) is highest-risk; Quality HVAC Fibid audit in progress with booking bot benchmark due July 31.

New client ramp-up (MedStation Meta/Google, Maadi Law Meta/Google/LSA) alongside routine updates for Billy Doe, Full Smile, Quality HVAC, Liferun, Justice Consumer Law; no critical fires but Billy Doe's July 4th creatives item updated June 29 shows possible publishing delay.

Billy Doe's Sub Box Video Ads stuck 33 days in For Review (last touch June 10); Full Smile's 7 Ads stalled 21 days; Quality HVAC's two items (6 Ads, 1 Reel) stalled ~60 days; Flow Co backlog sitting in For Review for months; Maadi Law's 10-clip onboarding request logged July 6.

Steel Round Bars website copy/AGS both marked Stuck; Healing Helps email deliverability stalled since May 28; Justice Consumer Law retargeting automation also Stuck; routine SEO reports filed for most clients; Maadi Law website first drafts assigned to Hashir with Framer admin access pending.
